character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate leader attempting to locate treasure, referencing Flint's death and the supernatural.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who claims to have seen Flint dead, expressing fear of the dead buccaneer.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who reacts with fear to the supernatural occurrences and Flint's ghost.

character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate who prays and is described as having been well brought up before falling in with bad company.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate whose voice is mistaken for Flint's, referenced in the group's supernatural encounter.

character_dossiers.name: Flint
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased pirate whose ghost is believed to haunt the group, referenced in their discussions.
